# Environment variables

<!-- Generated by `npm run env:generate` from lib/envSchema.ts. Do not hand-edit; run `npm run env:check` in CI to catch drift. -->

Every variable this app reads, grouped the same way as `.env.example`.
Secret values are never included here or in any generated artifact —
only names, defaults, and descriptions.

## Database (Postgres)

_Core._

| Variable | Secret | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `DATABASE_URL` | yes | Pooled Postgres connection string used at runtime. |
| `DIRECT_URL` | yes | Direct (non-pooled) Postgres connection string for migrations. |

## App

_Core._

| Variable | Secret | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `APP_BASE_URL` | no | Public base URL this deployment is served from. |
| `ADMIN_PASSWORD` | yes | Admin login password. Protected mode requires both this and ADMIN_SESSION_SECRET. |
| `READ_ONLY_PASSWORD` | yes | Optional second password for a signed read-only session. |
| `ADMIN_SESSION_SECRET` | yes | Signs expiring admin session cookies. |
| `ALLOW_INSECURE_OPEN_MODE` | no | Explicit local-only escape hatch for running without authentication. |
| `CRON_SECRET` | yes | Shared secret Vercel Cron and GitHub Actions must present on /api/cron/*. |

## Fork identity (optional overrides)

_Optional integration._

| Variable | Secret | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `REPOSITORY_SLUG` | no | Overrides the GitHub `owner/name` this deployment trusts and links to. |
| `CONTACT_RESEARCH_WORKFLOW_REF` | no | Overrides the exact workflow_ref trusted to run contact research via OIDC. |
| `CONTACT_AUDIT_WORKFLOW_REF` | no | Overrides the exact workflow_ref trusted to run contact audits via OIDC. |

## Contact research agent

_Optional integration._

| Variable | Secret | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `CONTACT_RESEARCH_AGENT_TOKEN` | yes | Optional dedicated token for local/development contact research workers. |
| `CONTACT_RESEARCH_LIMIT` | no | Optional local worker batch size (1-10, default 3). |
| `CONTACT_AUDIT_AGENT_TOKEN` | yes | Optional dedicated token for running the review-only contact audit worker locally. |

## Artist trajectory promotion

_Optional integration._

| Variable | Secret | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `TRAJECTORY_INGEST_AUTH_MODE` | no | Trajectory ingest auth mode: oidc (preferred), hmac, or oidc-or-hmac. |
| `TRAJECTORY_INGEST_GITHUB_REPOSITORY` | no | Exact producer repository (owner/name) trusted for trajectory ingest OIDC. |
| `TRAJECTORY_INGEST_GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF` | no | Exact workflow_ref trusted for trajectory ingest OIDC. |
| `TRAJECTORY_INGEST_RECEIPT_SECRET` | yes | Photo-admin-only signing key for short-lived successful dry-run receipts. |
| `TRAJECTORY_INGEST_HMAC_SECRET` | yes | Dedicated fallback secret for an explicitly selected hmac or oidc-or-hmac mode. |

## Spotify OAuth

_Optional integration._

| Variable | Secret | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID` | yes | Spotify OAuth app client ID. |
| `SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET` | yes | Spotify OAuth app client secret. |

## Stats.fm Plus

_Optional integration._

| Variable | Secret | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `STATSFM_TOKEN` | yes | Stats.fm session token (no public API). |

## EDMTrain

_Optional integration._

| Variable | Secret | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `EDMTRAIN_API_KEY` | yes | EDMTrain API key. |

## Resend (transactional email)

_Optional integration._

| Variable | Secret | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `RESEND_API_KEY` | yes | Resend API key. Sending domain must be verified. |
| `RESEND_FROM_EMAIL` | no | Sender address or "Name <address>" used for outgoing email. |
| `RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET` | yes | Resend webhook signing secret (whsec_...). |

## Send-time behavior

_Optional integration._

| Variable | Secret | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `SEND_TEST_OVERRIDE` | no | Legacy env-based test override for redirecting sends. |

## Google Sheets (optional one-way contact export)

_Optional integration._

| Variable | Secret | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_JSON` | yes | Raw service-account JSON credentials (preferred on Vercel). |
| `GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_PATH` | no | Path to the service-account JSON key file on disk (alternative to the JSON var). |
| `GOOGLE_CONTACT_EXPORT_SPREADSHEET_ID` | no | Destination spreadsheet ID for one-way contact exports. |
